annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: High-level convenience API for third-party integrations and scripts.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Snap a window to a zone by number on a screen.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Toggle between snapping and autotile mode for a screen.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get complete daemon state snapshot as JSON.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON with layouts, windows, autotile state.
